basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur has released the official notification for 4 Project Technical Support III posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is up to a maximum period of 5 years. Age relaxation for OBC candidates is up to a maximum period of 3 years. Age relaxation up to 5 years may be granted to deserving candidates having experience of working in Government Research Organization on a case-to-case basis, by DG, ICMR/Head of the Institution.

qualification.education_qualification: Three years graduate in relevant subject/field (Medical Social work (Community development/Social Welfare/Medical) or (Sociology/psychology/life sciences + three years' experience (in the field-based research) or PG degree in relevant subject/field (Medical social work/anthropology).
qualification.details: Three years graduate in relevant subject/field (Medical Social work (Community development/Social Welfare/Medical) or (Sociology/psychology/life sciences + three years' experience (in the field-based research) or PG degree in relevant subject/field (Medical social work/anthropology).

salary_details.details: Rs. 28000 Per Month + HRA (20% of basic)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
